Motion For Apportionment
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiffs' motion to apportion settlement funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Young S. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs.
Ron Acher, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Sandra Young, who was placed under oath and examined.
Eddie Young was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Order waiving appearance of Marianne Y. McMillen was filed on August 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that the heirs of decedent E. Gene Young are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying bankruptcy only action in the following proportions:

Sandra Young - 33 1/3%
Eddie Young - 33 1/3%
Marianne McMillen - 33 1/3%

Furthermore, the Law Offices of Paul & Hanley shall recover $1,065.17 for attorneys' fee and costs. Any future settlements shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Pursuant to Apportionment Hearing was submitted to and signed by the Court.
